Retractable Banner Stand Hardware Features & Setup

The Retractor Lite 33 Hardware provides a professional, lightweight solution for trade show displays, retail environments, and business presentations. This premium aluminum banner stand hardware system offers reliable performance and easy setup for your display needs.

Hardware Features & Benefits

  • Lightweight Aluminum Base: Durable construction that's easy to transport and set up
  • Color Options: Available in professional black or silver finish to match your brand
  • Dual Swivel Feet: Enhanced stability for secure display positioning
  • Shock Cord Pole System: Quick and effortless setup and takedown process
  • Professional Attachment System: Banner attaches with snap rail on top and banner tape on bottom
  • Compact Design: Space-efficient footprint perfect for trade show booths

Product Specifications

  • Dimensions: 34.5" W x 84" H x 15" D
  • Weight: 6.25 lbs for easy portability
  • Banner Compatibility: Designed for standard retractable banner materials
  • Setup Time: Less than 2 minutes assembly

Note: Banner graphics sold separately. Hardware only.

Production Times for Custom Retractor Lite 33 Hardware Orders

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your retractable banner hardware.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option for urgent trade show and event deadlines.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases - speak with a customer service representative for more information
  • Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from order confirmation. If an order requires additional review, turnaround starts from final approval

2 Business Days Express Production

Have an extra day, but still need your retractable banner hardware quickly? The express option is ideal for upcoming events!

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases - speak with a customer service representative for more information
  • Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from order confirmation. If an order requires additional review, turnaround starts from final approval

3 Business Days Standard Production

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any retractable banner hardware order.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases - speak with a customer service representative for more information
  • Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from order confirmation. If an order requires additional review, turnaround starts from final approval

5 Business Days Saver Production

If you're not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option for your banner hardware order.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases - speak with a customer service representative for more information
  • Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from order confirmation. If an order requires additional review, turnaround starts from final approval
